creator: sjr@home.com
text:
Last time I checked the CDROMs (in the tools section), the
	version of OS-BS beta wasn't the latest released version.
	Can the latest version be made available?

Fix: 

Verify license and grab latest version of OS-BS (beta) from either:

	http://www.prz.tu-berlin.de/~wolf/os-bs.html

	or

	ftp://ftp.prz.tu-berlin.de/pub/pc/os-bs/osbsBETA.exe
